description: Create a simple Python library with basic math utilities and comprehensive tests

tasks.title: Implement addition and subtraction functions
tasks.description: Create math_utils.py with add(a, b) and subtract(a, b) functions. Include docstrings and type hints.

tasks.title: Implement multiplication and division functions
tasks.description: Add multiply(a, b) and divide(a, b) functions to math_utils.py. Handle division by zero gracefully.

tasks.title: Write unit tests for basic operations
tasks.description: Create test_math_utils.py with pytest tests covering all four basic operations. Include edge cases.

tasks.title: Add power and square root functions
tasks.description: Implement power(base, exp) and sqrt(n) in math_utils.py with appropriate error handling.

tasks.title: Create README documentation
tasks.description: Write README.md with library overview, installation, usage examples, and API documentation.

success_criteria: All tasks completed, all tests passing, documentation complete
